data.title: What's Going On With Conduit Pharmaceuticals Shares Friday?
data.description: Conduit shares are trading higher after the company announced it filed multiple patents related to VTAMA (tapinarof).

data.title: What's Going On With Orion Properties Shares Friday?
data.description: Orion shares are trading higher on Friday after the company provided 2025 year-to-date leasing and sales updates.

data.title: Why Is Freight Technologies Stock Rocketing On Friday?
data.description: Freight Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: FRGT) has unveiled its new AI Lab to revolutionize cross-border freight logistics between the U.S. and Mexico. Partnering with the University of Monterrey, the lab will develop advanced AI tools using real-world data to improve efficiency and automation in logistics. This move strengthens Freight Tech's role in shaping the future of intelligent, data-driven supply chain operations.

data.title: What's Going On With Intel Shares Today?
data.description: Shares of Intel Corporation (NASDAQ: INTC) are trading lower Friday following reports about the deep financial connections of the company's new CEO, Lip-Bu Tan, to China's tech sector, including links to companies associated with China's military.

data.title: WISeKey Stock Rises On Satellite-Enabled IoT Announcement: What' Going On?
data.description: Shares of WISeKey International Holding Ltd (NASDAQ: WKEY) are trading higher Friday after the company announced a new proof of concept involving secure, off-grid IoT transactions via Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites.
